title: Reconnect GitHub repo to Vercel project
what_i_tried: gitSource API deploys work as a fallback (used MCP deploy_to_vercel this session). But the Vercel project has no GitHub link configured — so pushes don't auto-trigger deploys. The GitHub repo was missing entirely (carloshmiranda/verdedesk didn't exist) — I just created it and pushed all commits. The repo ID has changed to 1185612115.
what_carlos_needs_to_do: Connect the GitHub repo to the Vercel project so push-to-main triggers automatic deployments.
steps: Set root directory to 'MVP' (if not already set)
unblocks: Automatic deploy on every git push — no more manual gitSource API calls
